title: NeedsRequirements
description: Payload for message_type=NeedsRequirements. Sent by Commissioner → Concierge when GoalSpec is incomplete. This is NOT a failure — it is a requirements gap that Concierge must resolve before re-submitting. Run state transitions to BLOCKED_REQUIREMENTS.

block_reason.description: Primary reason Commissioner cannot approve. 'requirements_incomplete' = missing fields. 'contradiction' = conflicting constraints. 'risk_unbounded' = scope not constrainable.

missing.description: Each item describes a specific gap. Concierge must resolve all items before re-submitting GoalSpec.

field.description: JSON path to the missing or ambiguous field in GoalSpec (e.g. 'constraints.performance_budget').

question.description: The exact question Concierge should ask the user (or answer from GoalSpec context).

why.description: Why this field is needed to proceed (rationale for the user).

defaults.description: Sensible default options Concierge may apply if the user chooses 'fast path'.

proposed_acceptance_tests.description: Commissioner's suggestions for concrete acceptance tests that would resolve the gap. Concierge may adopt, adapt, or reject these. At least one test must be proposed.

risk_notes.description: Risk observations that informed the block decision.

commissioner_score.description: Completeness score (0–100) at the time of this NeedsRequirements. Used to track iteration progress.

decision.description: Must always be 'blocked_requirements' for this message type.
